signals.headline: US, Israel, and Iran Announce Two-Week Ceasefire in Middle East Conflict | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US, Israel, and Iran Announce Two-Week Ceasefire in Middle East Conflict | YES | HIGH confidence**  
A two-week ceasefire between the United States, Israel, and Iran was announced on April 8-9, 2026, halting escalation after U.S.-Israeli strikes and Iranian retaliation, with Russia welcoming the deal and expressing hope for successful U.S.-Iran negotiations.[1][2][3]  
Russian FM Sergei Lavrov voi
